patches.hypothesis: The bug occurs because when setting a new DateFormat, the TimeZone from the existing configuration is being used instead of preserving the original TimeZone set on the ObjectMapper.
patches.changes:
- TimeZone tz = (df == null) ? _timeZone : df.getTimeZone();
+ TimeZone tz = _timeZone;
patches.diff:
- TimeZone tz = (df == null) ? _timeZone : df.getTimeZone();
+ TimeZone tz = _timeZone;
